appDescription.message: LLM summary cards anchored to verbatim quotes in the page DOM.
appDescription.description: Short extension description shown in chrome://extensions and the Web Store

actionDefaultTitle.description: Tooltip shown on the toolbar action button

commandAnalyzePage.message: Open Parallel Reader and analyze the current page
commandAnalyzePage.description: Description for the Alt+Shift+R keyboard shortcut

statusPageSwitched.message: Page switched. Reselect a card on the current page.

statusRestoredSummary.description: $1 = card count, $2 = DOM-hit count, $3 = relative analyzed-at time

cardNotFoundInPage.message: Card #$1 not found on the current page.

errorMissingProviderSettings.message: Save API Key, Base URL, and Model before analyzing this page.

pageNotReadable.message: This page is not currently readable. $1$2
pageNotReadable.description: $1 = hint sentence, $2 = optional detail in parentheses

hintRefreshOrSwitch.message: Refresh the page or switch to a regular web page and try again.

btnReanalyzeTitle.message: Re-extract this page and replace the saved results.

settingsInvalid.description: $1 = first validation error message or default check-input prompt

cacheStatusNoCache.message: No cached data for this page.

historyCardsCount.description: $1 = card count for one history entry

qualityNoTextDetail.message: The page may still be loading, may require sign-in, or may not be an article body.

qualityShortDetail.message: The page may not be fully loaded, gated by a paywall, or not an article body.

qualityRawDetail.message: No stable article body extracted; results may mix navigation, comments, or ads.

qualityOkDetail.message: Article body is long enough; cards were generated from the stable text.

pageSupportInvalidUrl.message: Cannot parse the current page URL; reading is unavailable.

pageSupportInternalPage.message: This is a browser internal page or extension page. Switch to a regular web page and try again.

pageSupportPdfNotSupported.message: Browser PDF viewer is not supported yet. Open the article body or a copyable text view.

pageSupportProtocolUnsupported.message: Content scripts are not supported on the $1 protocol.

pageSupportFileAccessHint.message: Enable “Allow access to file URLs” for this extension in chrome://extensions, or use a local HTTP page instead.

providerErrorJsonParse.description: $1 = first 200 chars of the offending response

providerErrorSchemaMismatch.description: $1 = first 200 chars of the validation error

cardCannotLocateAriaLabel.message: Card #$1 cannot be located right now

cardClickToHighlightTitle.message: Click to highlight; right-click for more actions
